column8: We have got a lot of newspapers, but we have got little magazines.
column9: Will be there a new bookshop here?
column10: I am sure he will at school tomorrow.
column12: I think I am going to have a birthday party on Saturday.
column13: Once upon a time it was a prince who wanted to find a magic apple.
column14: Those fireman are very busy today.
column15: He has had this car since ten months.
column16: I didn't want to meet that postman so I had to leave quick.
column17: It isn't going to rain. You mustn't take an umbrella.
